name: zimage_font_measure_string
description: zImage_Font::MeasureString computes the widest line width and total line advance for a NUL-terminated string, including spaces, CR/LF handling, glyph fallback, and null-font no-op.
known_limits: Depends on zImage_Font::GetByIndexOrDefault, which is covered by the same smoke and is binary-safe.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?MeasureString@zImage_Font@@SIXPBDHPAH1@Z at 0x46f260 still fails: 133 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 147 bytes and the VC object symbol is 160 bytes. The drift is loop scheduling/register allocation around width and line-advance accumulation.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows font lookup, null-font early return, image height as line advance, accumulation of space width and glyph widths, CR skip, LF line reset plus total advance, and writes to outWidthPx/outLineAdvance.
The native font measurement smoke validates space/glyph/newline measurement, table-slot fallback, and no-op behavior when no font is available.
